prs.title: Release: March 2, 2026 - AWS Listed Competitors Fix & App Runner Update
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small-medium release combining a targeted competitors collector fix, an App Runner config update, and several documentation/changelog additions across 9 files, but no significant new logic or architectural change.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Competitor Accuracy & Infrastructure Reliability
stories.rationale: Fixed AWS listed competitor data and updated App Runner configuration to ensure accurate competitive intelligence and stable deployment infrastructure.
